title: Relate Subtraction and Division
essential_question: How is subtraction related to division?
strategies: Subtract the same number again and again until you reach 0.
Count how many times you subtracted — that's the quotient.

pretest.stem: How many times can you subtract 6 from 30?
A number line starts at 40. You make jumps of 5 back to 0. How many jumps?

learn.title: Repeated Subtraction
learn.content: Division can be shown by subtracting the same number until you reach 0. The number of times you subtract is the answer.

learn.title: Number Line Model
learn.content: Start at the total on a number line. Jump back by the divisor. Count the jumps. For 20 ÷ 4: start at 20, jump back 4 five times to reach 0.

hints: Think about what relate subtraction and division means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how relate subtraction and division works.
